name: tuitionflow
description: Cross-border tuition payment platform — XRPL Testnet attestations, swappable rails (MVP: MockRailAdapter, no real money).

scripts.demo: pnpm --filter @tuitionflow/api build && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @tuitionflow/api start" "pnpm --filter @tuitionflow/web dev"
scripts.db:migrate: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://tuitionflow:tuitionflow@localhost:5432/tuitionflow?schema=public pnpm --filter @tuitionflow/api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.demo:full: pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && cross-env PERSISTENCE=prisma DATABASE_URL=postgresql://tuitionflow:tuitionflow@localhost:5432/tuitionflow?schema=public pnpm demo
